title: Prototype Samples
content: A selection of prototype work from FindLaw and other projects. These are only a few samples. The work covers high-fidelity interactive prototypes, detailed user flow documentation, and edge case mapping for data-intensive admin tools and user management systems.

images.alt: Screenshot of Prototype Overview For Lockton Project
images.caption: High-Level Prototype for a Data-Driven Application: A Figma prototype overview for a dark-mode data application, organized into functional modules — Results, Preferences, Listing Detail, and Audit Log. The flow lines show how users navigate between charts, data tables, and settings panels.

images.alt: Screenshot of Prototype Overview for Utility Screens
images.caption: Administrative Tool for User and Account Management: Prototype overview for the Settings, Placements, and Admin/Manage Accounts sections, mapping the user flows for adding, editing, and managing accounts across complex decision paths.

images.alt: Screenshot of Prototype Overview for Utility Screens
images.caption: Detailed User Flows for Feature Testing and Implementation: Documented user flows covering the default path, input error states, maximum user capacity, and user deletion. Each flow includes annotations and navigation paths for the development handoff.
